summary:
Perfect! The tests passed. The needle (the hidden problem) was a port mismatch in the nginx configuration where the upstream proxy was pointing to port 5001 instead of the correct port 5000 where the Flask application was running. 

The issue has been successfully resolved by changing the `proxy_pass` directive in `/etc/nginx/sites-available/default` from `http://127.0.0.1:5001` to `http://127.0.0.1:5000`.
